text_chunks: Apple reported durable Services growth, offsetting softer hardware unit growth in selected geographies.
Gross margin remained resilient due to product mix and supply chain optimization, while FX remained a headwind.
Capital return stayed central, including dividends and repurchases, with a continued focus on balance sheet flexibility.
Management highlighted demand sensitivity to financing costs and consumer confidence in developed markets.
Risk factors emphasized regulatory shifts, global trade friction, and concentration risks in advanced semiconductor supply.
